collect_item.character: blop! sound effect (removed in Life Force, present in Salamander arcade)

distinctive_elements: Narrative stage introductions describing alien body zones (North American version)

sources_used: tcrf - Life Force (NES) - The Cutting Room Floor

extraction_notes.data_limitations: Sources provide minimal audio documentation. TCRF and Wikipedia focus on gameplay mechanics, graphics, regional differences, and development credits rather than musical composition details. No tempo, key signatures, chord progressions, time signatures, or detailed SFX characteristics are documented in available sources.
extraction_notes.composer_credits_identified: S.Sakamoto, S.Terashima, H.Maezawa, A.Fujio (from Salamander staff roll in TCRF source)
extraction_notes.sfx_documented: Only 'blop!' sound effect mentioned as regional difference - played before Tetran boss fight in Salamander arcade version but removed in Life Force NES version
extraction_notes.music_changes_noted: Wikipedia mentions 'Some music tracks have been completely changed' for Japanese Life Force re-release, but no specific track details provided
